tenantId.description: Enter your Azure Tenant ID (Directory ID) or keep "common" for multi-tenant apps. Using a specific Tenant ID is generally recommended and required for certain authentication flows.

customScopes.description: Define custom scopes. You might need this if the default scopes are not sufficient or if you want to minimize permissions. Ensure you include "openid" and "offline_access".

authQueryParameters.description: For some services additional query parameters have to be set which can be defined here

enabledScopes.description: Space-separated list of scopes to request.
